titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdur Rahman Ibn Abi Abdullah Al-Basri
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdur Rahman Ibn Abi Abdullah Al-Basri

segments: ه عن عبد الرّحمن بن أبي عبد اللّه البصريّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أيّوب بن نوح، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير و غيره، عن عبد الرّحمن بن أبي عبد اللّه‌.
arabic.text: ه عن عبد الرّحمن بن أبي عبد اللّه البصريّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أيّوب بن نوح، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير و غيره، عن عبد الرّحمن بن أبي عبد اللّه‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Abdur Rahman ibn Abi Abdullah Al-Basri has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ayyub ibn Nuh, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr and others, from Abdur Rahman ibn Abi Abdullah.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Abdur Rahman ibn Abi Abdullah Al-Basri has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ayyub ibn Nuh, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr and others, from Abdur Rahman ibn Abi Abdullah.
